response.overview: MK once again sets out to make his tea, but this time he must face his most formidable opponent so far... Uncle Frank. With all of his friends trapped in the phantom zone, including the mighty Darren Walsh, and Uncle Frank powered with enough Gick to destroy the universe, MK must set out to Blanchardstown Shopping Centre one more time in his most epic journey yet.
response.title: Making Tea: Part Two
